responses: Hello! Welcome to the School Admissions Portal. How can I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm here to help you with school admission queries.
Greetings! How can I help you with your school inquiry today?
Goodbye! Feel free to reach out if you have more questions about admissions.

patterns: How can I apply for admission?
responses: The admission process is: Online registration → Entrance test/interaction → Document verification → Fee payment.
You can apply through our website and complete the admission form.
Register online, attend the interaction session, submit documents, and confirm admission.
Required documents: Birth Certificate, Aadhaar Card, Transfer Certificate, last academic report card, and passport photos.
Please bring Birth Certificate, residence proof, previous school certificate, and photographs.
The fee structure includes Admission Fee ₹25,000 (one-time), Annual Fee ₹10,000, and Monthly Tuition Fee starting from ₹5,000.
For new admissions: Admission Fee ₹25,000, Security Deposit ₹5,000 (refundable), and Tuition Fee ₹5,000–₹7,500 depending on grade.
Primary classes start at ₹5,000 per month plus annual charges.
Nursery requires age 3+ years, LKG 4+, UKG 5+, and Grade 1 requires 6+ years.
The age is calculated as of March 31 of the admission year.
Pre-primary timing: 8:30 AM to 12:30 PM. Grade 1 onwards: 8:00 AM to 2:30 PM.
School operates Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 2:30 PM.
We follow the CBSE curriculum with focus on academics and extracurricular development.
Our curriculum encourages practical learning and innovation.
Students can participate in sports, music, dance, robotics, and art programs.
We offer activities like football, basketball, coding club, music, and debate.
Yes, school buses cover major areas of the city.
Bus fees range from ₹1500 to ₹3000 depending on the distance.
Yes, hostel facilities are available for boys and girls.
Hostel fee is approximately ₹60,000 per year including accommodation and meals.
Yes, merit scholarships offer up to 50% tuition fee waiver.
Students with excellent academic performance can apply for scholarships.
The campus is secured with CCTV surveillance and trained security staff.
Student safety is our highest priority.
We provide football, cricket, basketball, athletics, and indoor games.
Professional coaches guide students in sports activities.
Our school library has over 10,000 books and digital resources.
Students can borrow books and use the reading hall.
Students learn coding, robotics, and digital skills in our modern computer labs.
Technology education is part of the curriculum.
We celebrate annual day, sports day, science fairs, and cultural festivals.
Students participate in competitions and exhibitions.
You can contact us at +91 98765 43210 or email vidhyapeethaadmissions@gmail.com.
Our campus is located in Whitefield,Bangalore.
